mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3B — Effective Import Path and Dependency Resolution Map

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A3B"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
 (drop/r"effective_import_resolution_map_v1.py",installed/r"effective_import_resolution_map_v1.py","e96cf5a8bb01616d6c04ca04089e03beb7c16dde22178a015b238c206db869da"),
 (drop/r"EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP_CONTRACT_V1.json",installed/r"EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP_CONTRACT_V1.json","d081f81ab7c943cd765878ba31af79c1cf595a9fb45583585fee97cfc0d7124c"),
 (drop/r"README_V1A3B.md",installed/r"README_V1A3B.md","acccd3a766483f66bdad08bdc9e769b12510a8bff9bd74272e4fb8c5ae5845dd"),
]
for src,dst,expected in checks:
 assert src.is_file() and dst.is_file(),(src,dst)
 assert hashlib.sha256(src.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,src
 assert hashlib.sha256(dst.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected,dst
script=(installed/r"effective_import_resolution_map_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(installed/r"effective_import_resolution_map_v1.py"),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
 if isinstance(node,ast.Import): imports.update(a.name.split('.')[0] for a in node.names)
 elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module: imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser","importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden),sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract=json.loads((installed/r"EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get("schema")=="foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a3b.effective_import_map_contract.v1"
assert contract.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-154935-FF96C4"
bound=contract.get("execution_boundary",{})
for key in ("foxai_source_execution","launcher_execution","pythonw_execution","package_imports","pip_invocation","network_use","model_loading"):
 assert bound.get(key) is False,(key,bound.get(key))
assert bound.get("interpreter_child_processes_spawned_by_payload")==0
assert bound.get("shell_child_processes_spawned_by_payload")==0
for source_dir,receipt_name,result in [
 (Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-063725-BFCAB9_V1A2R2_IMMUTABLE_BRIDGE"),"REFINED_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json","immutable_input_determinism_repair_complete"),
 (Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-152146-C4F8D5_V1A3A_R1_ADOPTED_RUNTIME_MAP"),"PYTHON_RUNTIME_CORRECTION_RECEIPT.json","python_site_policy_validation_repaired_and_evidence_adopted"),
]:
 receipt=json.loads((source_dir/receipt_name).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 assert receipt.get("result")==result,(receipt_name,receipt.get("result"))
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3B_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3B payloads, syntax, source receipts, and zero-execution contract
Run in-memory effective import mapping self-tests
Build deterministic effective import contexts and dependency candidates from verified evidence only
Run built-in V1A-3B output, hash, coverage, safety, and size validator

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-154935-FF96C4_V1A3B_EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP")
contexts=json.loads((out/r"EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_CONTEXTS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
launchers=json.loads((out/r"LAUNCHER_IMPORT_PATH_MAP.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
rows=contexts.get("contexts",[])
def selected(path): return [x for x in rows if str(x.get("launcher_path","")).casefold()==path.casefold()]
work=selected(r"Z:\FOXAI\Launch FOXAI Workshop.bat")
assert len(work)==2,work
alias=[x for x in work if x.get("interpreter_reference_kind")=="command_alias_requires_path_resolution"]
assert len(alias)==1 and alias[0].get("interpreter_reference").casefold()=="python"
assert alias[0].get("resolved_interpreter_path") is None
assert all(str(x.get("resolved_interpreter_path","")).casefold()!=r"z:\foxai\python" for x in work)
web=selected(r"Z:\FOXAI\START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
assert len(web)==1 and web[0].get("runtime_id")=="portable_env"
webpaths=[str(x.get("path","")).casefold() for x in web[0].get("effective_path_entries",[])]
assert r"z:\foxai\runtime\core\site-packages" in webpaths
assert webpaths[0]==r"z:\foxai"
combo=selected(r"Z:\FOXAI\START_FOXAI_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI.bat")
assert len(combo)==1 and combo[0].get("runtime_id")=="portable_desktop" and "-I" in combo[0].get("flags",[])
assert not any(x.get("source")=="launcher_pythonpath" for x in combo[0].get("effective_path_entries",[]))
combo_map=next(x for x in launchers.get("records",[]) if str(x.get("launcher_path","")).casefold()==r"z:\foxai\start_foxai_web_with_comfyui.bat")
assert len(combo_map.get("called_launchers",[]))==1
assert combo_map["called_launchers"][0].get("called_context_ids")==[web[0]["context_id"]]
desk=selected(r"Z:\FOXAI\START_FOXAI_DESKTOP_TWO_WINDOW_RECOVERY.bat")
assert len(desk)==2
helper=next(x for x in desk if x.get("runtime_identity_directly_observed") is True)
gui=next(x for x in desk if x.get("interpreter_reference_kind")=="pythonw_static_sibling_of_observed_python")
assert "-I" in helper.get("flags",[]) and not any(x.get("source")=="launcher_pythonpath" for x in helper.get("effective_path_entries",[]))
assert gui.get("pythonw_identity_directly_observed") is False
paths=[str(x.get("path","")).casefold() for x in gui.get("effective_path_entries",[])]
assert paths[:3]==[r"z:\foxai",r"z:\foxai\runtime\desktop\site-packages",r"z:\foxai\runtime\core\site-packages"],paths[:3]
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3B_PROTECTED_CONTEXTS_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify separate protected launcher import contexts, unresolved Workshop alias, and pythonw boundary

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-154935-FF96C4_V1A3B_EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP")
providers=json.loads((out/r"NORMALIZED_PACKAGE_PROVIDERS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
conflicts=json.loads((out/r"REFINED_DEPENDENCY_CONFLICT_CANDIDATES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
resolution=json.loads((out/r"STATIC_IMPORT_RESOLUTION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for row in providers.get("providers",[]):
 name=str(row.get("module","")).casefold()
 assert name!="__pycache__" and not name.endswith((".dist-info",".egg-info",".data")),row
assert providers.get("packages_imported") is False and providers.get("pip_invoked") is False
assert conflicts.get("active_collision_proven") is False
assert all(x.get("active_or_successful_import_conflict_proven") is False for x in conflicts.get("same_effective_context_collision_candidates",[]))
assert all(x.get("active_or_successful_import_conflict_proven") is False for x in conflicts.get("separate_runtime_version_or_provider_differences",[]))
assert resolution.get("imports_performed") is False and resolution.get("import_success_proven") is False
assert resolution.get("resolved_live_path_group_count",0)>0
assert resolution.get("historical_path_group_count_preserved_without_expansion",0)>0
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3B_PROVIDER_AND_CONFLICT_RULES_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify normalized package providers and nonactive dependency-conflict classifications

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-154935-FF96C4_V1A3B_EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP")
required={"EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_CONTEXTS.json","LAUNCHER_IMPORT_PATH_MAP.json","NORMALIZED_PACKAGE_PROVIDERS.json","STATIC_IMPORT_RESOLUTION.json","REFINED_DEPENDENCY_CONFLICT_CANDIDATES.json","DYNAMIC_IMPORT_AND_PATH_MUTATION_REPORT.json","IMPORT_RESOLUTION_COVERAGE.json","EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP_RECEIPT.json"}
assert required.issubset({p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()})
receipt=json.loads((out/r"EFFECTIVE_IMPORT_MAP_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-154935-FF96C4"
assert receipt.get("result")=="effective_import_path_and_dependency_resolution_map_complete"
assert receipt.get("source_outputs_verified_exact") is True
assert receipt.get("internal_deterministic_rebuild_match") is True
assert receipt.get("compared_output_count")==7
for key in ("network_used","packages_imported","pip_invoked","models_loaded","launchers_executed","foxai_source_imported_or_executed","pythonw_executed","existing_foxai_source_modified","active_collision_proven"):
 assert receipt.get(key) is False,(key,receipt.get(key))
assert receipt.get("interpreter_child_processes")==0 and receipt.get("shell_child_processes")==0
assert receipt.get("source_launcher_record_count")==536
assert receipt.get("source_code_file_count")==565
for item in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
 p=out/item["name"]
 assert p.is_file() and p.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"]
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.rglob('*') if p.is_file())
assert total<=64*1024*1024,total
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3B_COMPLETE_OUTPUTS_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify deterministic receipt, exact output hashes, zero child processes, and 64 MiB ceiling
Exercise read-only compare-runtime-versions query over generated indexes
